description_long: This is a rustic, wooden handcart with a rectangular open cargo area surrounded by sturdy side rails made from thick wooden rods. The cart is supported by two large, spoked wooden wheels mounted on either side near the rear, providing stability and ease of movement. At the front, two long, parallel wooden handles extend outward, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The load platform consists of spaced wooden slats, allowing for ventilation and drainage, while the side rails prevent items from falling out during transport. The overall construction appears robust, with visible wood grain and a weathered, matte finish, suggesting it is built for heavy-duty use in urban or rural settings. Metal fastenings are visible at the wheel hubs and handle joints, reinforcing the structure.
description: A weathered wooden handcart with side rails, two large spoked wheels, and long front handles, featuring an open slatted cargo platform.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handcart, both wheels, side rails, and the extended handles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual handles, the open slatted platform, and the front edge of the side rails.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wheels, side rails, and the handles extending outward.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the cart, the side rails, and the alignment of the wheels.
